LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SERIES OF LOCKTON COMPANIES, LLC'S MOTION TO SEAL TRADE SECRET, CONFIDENTIAL, AND PRIVATE INFORMATION AND MATERIALS LODGED IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY THE ACTION IS GRANTED. (1) PORTION OF PARAGRAPHS 12, 14, 17, 18, 22, 23 AND 25 AND ALL OF PARAGRAPHS 20, 24 AND 26 OF THE DECLARATION OF WILLIAM HUMPHREY III; 2) PORTION OF PARAGRAPHS 5, 10, 12, 13 AND 16 AND ALL OF PARAGRAPHS 11, 14, 17, 18 AND 20 OF THE DECLARATION OF PAMELA PASTORE; 3) EXH. E TO THE APPENDIX OF COMMON EXH. (FIRST AMENDMENT TO MEMBER AGREEMENT) NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SERIES OF LOCKTON COMPANIES, LLC'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY THE ACTION UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 410.30 - CASE IS STAYED PENDING RESOLUTION BY THE ILLINOIS COURT. THE PARTIES ARE ENCOURAGED BY THE COURT TO COME BACK IF THE ILLINOIS COURT REFUSES TO DECIDE OR CANNOT COME UP WITH A DECISION IN A REASONABLE PERIOD OF TIME. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO SEND BY WAY OF E-MAIL TO THE COURT) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS ROBERT LIPPS' AND ARTHUR GALLAGHER'S Motion To Conditionally Seal Exh. 1 lodged in Support of Opposition To Defendants Motion To Dismiss Or Stay The Action is Granted. (EX. I, 1/7/2007 "Operating Agreement of Lockton Companies, LLC and each of its Series (Operating Agreement)attached to the declaration of Robert T. Lipps in Support of Plaintiff's Opposition to Defendant's Motion to Dismiss or Stay the Action) No opposition was filed and good cause shown. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)
